scene_summary: A misty moss-and-soil tabletop landscape with a large dusty pink translucent acetate slab across the center, smaller cloudy glass panes at left and lower field, a suspended dark soil island in the upper right, faint waveform-like scratch lines at left, two tiny green signal lights, thin registration seams, pink vertical overprint at the right edge, root-like pale threads across the foreground, and small pale bead/bloom clusters near the lower right.
usable_surfaces: left cloudy glass pane with waveform scratches
right vertical pink edge strip with ruler ticks

detected_objects.label: PINKCOURTESYPHONE translucent album slab
detected_objects.visual_evidence: large dusty pink translucent rectangular plate tilted across the center with visible dirt flecks, scratches, overprint glow, and hard glass-like edges

detected_objects.label: I Want An Earth soil aperture
detected_objects.visual_evidence: broad floating dark moss-and-earth island in the upper right with a distinct underside, dusty rim, twig textures, and shadowed aperture-like volume

detected_objects.label: Enfield winter blue buried edge
detected_objects.visual_evidence: cold blue-gray translucent rectangular torn/paper-like pane emerging at the left side over frosty haze and wintery scrub

detected_objects.label: Clouded Chords fog pane
detected_objects.visual_evidence: lower-left cloudy translucent glass pane with milky speckled condensation and angled hard edges embedded in moss

detected_objects.label: It's Okay to Disappear fading waveform root
detected_objects.visual_evidence: fine black waveform-like vertical scratches along the left fog pane, fading into moss and mist toward the green pin

detected_objects.label: A' Chailleach peat spiral thread
detected_objects.visual_evidence: long pale root/thread gesture arcs through the peat foreground, looping around the central slab and threading toward the right-side signal light

detected_objects.label: Flowers Of Evil pale bloom interruption
detected_objects.visual_evidence: small cluster of pale round bead-like blooms interrupting the dark moss near the lower right foreground

detected_objects.label: right pink overprint ruler edge
detected_objects.visual_evidence: tall translucent dusty pink vertical strip at the far right with visible ruler-like tick marks and a hard overprint boundary

detected_objects.label: Flowers Of Evil pale bloom interruption
detected_objects.visual_evidence: Planned source surface fallback used because plate inspection returned fewer mapped objects than source bindings.

complexity_assessment.rationale: The plate remains expressionist and source-readable, but several overlapping glass panes, soil islands, threads, seams, and signal lights create moderate density; interaction mapping should stay tied to the clearest physical marks rather than the atmospheric haze.

mapping_note: Package assembly filled unmapped source pockets from planned artifact surfaces because plate inspection returned too few detected objects.
